HomePage.hero-title: Building <highlight>interfaces, systems and digital products</highlight> with a focus on clarity and performance.
HomePage.hero-description: Full-stack developer with experience in React.js, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, Nest.js and REST API integration, bringing together real projects, internal tools and interfaces for different businesses.
HomePage.about-title: Hands-on experience across the TypeScript ecosystem
HomePage.about-text: Software developer with over 5 years of experience in the TypeScript ecosystem, with strong expertise in React.js, Node.js/Nest.js, API integration and Prisma ORM. I have been responsible for developing and implementing end-to-end web solutions, building systems to optimize service pricing, corporate meeting management, and other operational workflows.
HomePage.experience-description: Professional experience building full-stack products, integrating REST APIs and delivering systems for internal operations and client-facing workflows.
HomePage.formation-description: Academic and technical education that supports product thinking, software architecture and the foundations behind web applications.
HomePage.contact-description: If you want to talk about product, full-stack architecture, API integration or a new project, I'm one message away.

responsibilities.1: Development of web applications using React.js
responsibilities.2: Integration with RESTful APIs in NodeJS

responsibilities.1: Developed a system to schedule, organize, and visualize internal company meetings
responsibilities.2: Created applications to improve the accuracy of services provided
responsibilities.3: Deployed on AWS using S3, EC2, Elastic Beanstalk, among others

Projects.featured-description: A curated slice of the current portfolio with published products, internal systems and experiments.
Projects.archive-description: A broader collection of web applications, APIs, admin systems and product experiments built across the journey.

project-chrono-study.title: Chrono Study
project-chrono-study.description: Helps time and organize your studies. You can add subjects and view study statistics through charts and tables.

project-jogo-da-velha-02.title: Tic Tac Toe 2.0
project-jogo-da-velha-02.description: Tic Tac Toe made much more strategic. There are 9 tic-tac-toe boards inside a larger board.

project-transfer-case.title: Transfer Case
project-transfer-case.description: Web application for managing fleets, drivers, incidents, and refueling, with document uploads and tables with advanced filters.

project-transfer-back.title: Transfer Back (Express)
project-transfer-back.description: REST API for fleet management with vehicles, drivers, incidents, refueling, and documents, built with Express, Prisma, Redis, and Swagger.

project-transfer-nestjs.title: Transfer Back (NestJS)
project-transfer-nestjs.description: NestJS version of the Transfer Back fleet management API, keeping modules for vehicles, drivers, incidents, refueling, and documentation.

project-tizen-iptv-open.title: Tizen IPTV Open
project-tizen-iptv-open.description: IPTV frontend optimized for Samsung Tizen, with remote-control navigation and a startup flow for channels, series, and movies.

project-dispatch-system.title: Dispatch System
project-dispatch-system.description: Import contacts from Excel and send messages to them via WhatsApp.

project-dlav.title: D'Lav
project-dlav.description: Organize the entire washing process. QR Codes are generated to track all stages of the wash.

project-gestao-clinica.title: Clinic Management
project-gestao-clinica.description: Robust system for managing clinics with scheduling, registration, management, and payment features.

project-osc-manager.title: OSC Manager
project-osc-manager.description: Project management for NGOs. Visualize, analyze, and track projects.

project-pesquisa-satisfacao.title: Satisfaction Survey
project-pesquisa-satisfacao.description: Manages surveys and generates charts with summarized results.

project-reunioes.title: Meeting System
project-reunioes.description: Complete meeting system. Manage and create meetings. Generate minutes, agendas, and actions for each user.

project-saulo-imoveis.title: Saulo Real Estate
project-saulo-imoveis.description: Developed to showcase the finest luxury properties in Fortaleza.

project-vacation-plan.title: Vacation Plan
project-vacation-plan.description: See your friends' vacations and organize them on the calendar.

project-viu-ganhou.title: Watch and Earn
project-viu-ganhou.description: Watch ads and complete tasks to earn money and withdraw in cryptocurrencies.
